title: Givens (stormtrooper)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]|the [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[ambassador]] of the [[Givens|same name]]|linebreak=1}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Givens |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], [[AX-456]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Any time, sir."
"Thank you, Givens.|Givens and Katarn, after the former armed a demo charge|''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''}} '''Givens''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]], holding the rank of [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Biography== In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he was a member of the platoon led by [[Cadet Leader]] [[Kyle Katarn]] where they were assigned aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Imperator (Imperial-class)|''Imperator'']] to take control over [[AX-456]]. Along with [[Morely]], he was the team's demolitions expert. He was soon killed in the [[Battle of AX-456|battle]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Enlisted stormtroopers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
